analysis.name: Anoma
analysis.summary: Anoma是一个意图中心的基础设施项目，近期因Binance Alpha和期货上线预期而受到关注，但价格已从高点大幅回落，当前链上流动性极低，存在操纵风险。
catalysts: Binance Alpha和Binance Futures上线预期（2025年9月）

latestNews.title: Anoma (XAN) Will Be Available on Binance Alpha and Binance Futures (2025-09-23)
latestNews.reason: 上线主流交易所提升流动性和曝光度

latestNews.title: Anoma (XAN) Listing Will Be Postponed on Binance Alpha and Binance Futures (2025-09-29)
latestNews.reason: 推迟上线打击市场信心

latestNews.title: 🔹 XAN currency drops 60% after being listed on major platforms: reasons and analysis
latestNews.reason: 上线后价格暴跌，显示抛压巨大

latestNews.title: Anoma (XAN) risks bull trap after explosive 42% price surge
latestNews.reason: 技术分析警告可能为多头陷阱

fundamentals: 意图中心操作系统，支持跨链应用开发
总供应量100亿，流通量25亿，流通率25%
获得Delphi Ventures、Polychain Capital等顶级机构投资
项目上线后价格从ATH 0.27美元跌至当前0.0098美元，跌幅超96%
marketRead: 链上Orca池流动性高达10.3亿美元，但24小时交易量仅约4美元，流动性严重失真，疑似LP被操纵或为虚假深度
24小时价格下跌2.9%，7日上涨6%，但30日下跌7.9%，整体处于下行趋势
市值2442万美元，FDV9777万美元，流通市值占比低，未来解锁压力大
risks: 链上流动性极低，交易量几乎为零，存在拉盘砸盘风险
总供应量100亿，大量代币未解锁，未来抛压巨大
上线交易所后价格暴跌60%，市场信心不足
项目概念虽新但竞争激烈，实际采用情况不明
watchlist: Binance是否最终上线及上线后价格表现
代币解锁时间表及实际流通量变化
链上交易量是否恢复正常水平
sourceNotes: 链上数据来自Orca DEX，流动性数据异常，需谨慎对待
新闻来源为Google News聚合，部分标题可能为SEO优化内容
项目基本面信息来自CoinGecko，未验证最新进展

profile.name: Anoma
profile.description: Anoma is the decentralized OS powering a unified app layer for all Web3. With Anoma, developers can write one app that works on any chain. Anoma frees developers from the complexity of infrastructure so they can focus on what matters: building apps and experiences that people love. Anoma introduces a next-gen intent-centric architecture optimized for app development and UX, enabling Web3 to support a rich ecosystem of apps that can finally compete with the functionality and experience of Web2.
